steps.t: You have entered the Halls of Black Lore. You should speak to Faeron.
You should follow Faeron and keep to the shadows.
Lhaereth has entered and is speaking to one who can only be the keeper of the Halls of Black Lore. You should listen to their conversation.
Someone, or something, has created a diversion for you! You should escape the Halls of Black Lore!
